name: provenance manifest is written one per commit at the architecture-named path
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc123 --out .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json ] && grep -q '"commit":"abc123"' .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json && echo ok 1>&2
